# llms.txt — Restream Affiliate Landing Page

site: https://try.restream.io/rwapmhjhzv2z

purpose: conversion-optimized landing page promoting Restream multistreaming SaaS

audience:
- content creators
- streamers (Twitch, YouTube, TikTok)
- marketers
- businesses running live events
- podcasters

primary_goal:
- drive free signups to Restream
- maximize click-through rate to affiliate link

core_offer:
- multistream live video to 30+ platforms simultaneously
- free plan available
- no credit card required to start

key_features:
- restream studio (browser-based streaming)
- unified chat across platforms
- multistreaming to Twitch, YouTube, Facebook, TikTok, etc.
- analytics dashboard
- guest invites
- scheduled streaming

primary_cta:
- https://try.restream.io/rwapmhjhzv2z

secondary_cta:
- https://try.restream.io/studio-PalmariniServices

conversion_notes:
- emphasize speed ("go live in minutes")
- emphasize simplicity ("one stream everywhere")
- emphasize trust ("7M+ creators")
- minimize friction (no signup barriers before CTA)

tone:
- direct
- high-conversion SaaS marketing style
- clarity over hype

affiliate_disclosure:
- this page contains affiliate links that may generate commission

seo_keywords:
- multistreaming
- live streaming software
- stream to multiple platforms
- restream alternative
- twitch youtube streaming tool
